title: cerastium arcticum var. procerum
intro: Cerastium arcticum var. procerum, also known as the Arctic Mouse-ear or Dwarf Snow-in-Summer, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the carnation family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Cerastium arcticum var. procerum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a valuable addition to holistic health practices and traditional medicine.
